title: useOpenState
description: Manages a toggleable state with optional external control via props.

body.raw:
## Usage

The `useOpenState` hook provides an easy way to manage open/close state for components, modals, or dropdowns. It's perfect for handling visibility toggles or managing whether an element is expanded or collapsed. Below is a basic example that demonstrates how to use the `useOpenState` hook to manage the open/close state of a component.

<UseOpenStateDemosUsage />

### Create Tooltip

The `useOpenState` hook can be used for managing the visibility of UI elements like tooltips. This section demonstrates how to create a tooltip component that opens and closes based on state managed by the hook.

<UseOpenStateDemosUsageTooltip />

---

## Depend on

- [`useHotkeys`](/docs/web/hooks/use-hotkeys)
- [`useMeasureScrollbar`](/docs/web/hooks/use-measure-scrollbar)

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.

<SourceCodes name="use-open-state" />

`,(0,n.jsx)(r,{name:"use-open-state",code:`"use client";\r
import { createPortal } from "react-dom";\r
import { useHotkeys } from "@/hooks/use-hotkeys";\r
import { useMeasureScrollbar } from "@/hooks/use-measure-scrollbar";\r
import { useCallback, useEffect, useLayoutEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
import { useClickOutside } from "@/hooks/use-click-outside";\r
import { SizeElement, useElementRect } from "@/hooks/use-element-info";\r
\r
export enum Selector {\r
  Trigger = "trigger",\r
  Content = "content",\r
  Overlay = "overlay",\r
  Root = "root",\r
  Item = "item"\r
}\r
export enum DataAlign {\r
  start = "start",\r
  center = "center",\r
  end = "end"\r
}\r
export enum DataSide {\r
  top = "top",\r
  right = "right",\r
  bottom = "bottom",\r
  left = "left"\r
}\r
export enum DataState {\r
  open = "open",\r
  opened = "opened",\r
  closed = "closed"\r
}\r
export type RectInfo = "x" | "y" | "width" | "height" | "top" | "right" | "bottom" | "left" | "scrollX" | "scrollY";\r
type Observes = "side" | "align" | "touch" | "offset" | "sideswipe" | "alignswipe" | "triggerRect" | "contentRect" | "measureSize";\r
export type MeasureSize = { h: number | "auto"; w: number | "auto" };\r
export type RectElement = Record<RectInfo, number>;\r
interface ObserveOptions {\r
  observe?: Partial<Record<Observes, boolean>>;\r
}\r
interface StateSharedOptions {\r
  align?: \`\${DataAlign}\`;\r
  side?: \`\${DataSide}\`;\r
  sideOffset?: number;\r
  alignOffset?: number;\r
  multipleOpen?: boolean;\r
  open?: boolean;\r
  onOpenChange?: (open: SetStateAction<boolean>) => void;\r
  delay?: { open?: number; closed?: number };\r
}\r
export interface HoverOpenOptions extends StateSharedOptions {}\r
export interface ClickOpenOptions extends StateSharedOptions {\r
  modal?: boolean;\r
  popstate?: boolean;\r
  defaultOpen?: boolean;\r
  clickOutsideToClose?: boolean;\r
  hotKeys?: "/" | "M" | "ctrl+J" | "ctrl+K" | "alt+mod+shift+X" | (string & {});\r
}\r
\r
export interface OpenStateOptions extends HoverOpenOptions, ClickOpenOptions, ObserveOptions {\r
  triggerRef?: React.RefObject<HTMLButtonElement | null>;\r
  contentRef?: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement | null>;\r
}\r
\r
const DEFAULTEVENTS = ["mousedown", "touchstart"];\r
const BUFFER_OFFSET = 2;\r
\r
function nextValue<T>(currentValue: T, values: T[]): T {\r
  const currentIndex = values.indexOf(currentValue);\r
  const nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % values.length;\r
  if (currentIndex === values.length - 1) return values[currentIndex];\r
  return values[nextIndex];\r
}\r
\r
export function setValues<T>(state: boolean | undefined | string | number, attr: T): T | Record<string, never> {\r
  return state ? (attr as T) : {};\r
}\r
\r
export function setVars(selector: \`\${Selector}\`, info?: RectElement): Record<string, string> | undefined {\r
  if (!info) return;\r
  const properties = ["height", "width", "x", "y", "right", "bottom"] as const;\r
  return properties.reduce(\r
    (acc, key) => {\r
      if (info[key] !== undefined) {\r
        acc[\`--\${selector}-\${key[0]}\`] = \`\${info[key]}px\`;\r
      }\r
      return acc;\r
    },\r
    {} as Record<string, string>\r
  );\r
}\r
\r
interface GetInsetProps {\r
  align: "start" | "center" | "end";\r
  side: "top" | "right" | "bottom" | "left";\r
  sideOffset: number;\r
  alignOffset: number;\r
  triggerRect: RectElement;\r
  contentRect: RectElement;\r
}\r
\r
export function getInset(_props: GetInsetProps): readonly [number, number] {\r
  const { align, side, contentRect, sideOffset, alignOffset, triggerRect } = _props;\r
  let top: number = 0;\r
  let left: number = 0;\r
\r
  const calcAlign = (triggerStart: number, triggerSize: number, contentSize: number): number => {\r
    switch (align) {\r
      case "start":\r
        return triggerStart;\r
      case "center":\r
        return triggerStart + (triggerSize - contentSize) / 2;\r
      case "end":\r
        return triggerStart + triggerSize - contentSize;\r
      default:\r
        return triggerStart;\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  switch (side) {\r
    case "top":\r
      top = triggerRect.top - contentRect.height - sideOffset;\r
      left = calcAlign(triggerRect.left + alignOffset, triggerRect.width, contentRect.width);\r
      break;\r
    case "right":\r
      top = calcAlign(triggerRect.top + alignOffset, triggerRect.height, contentRect.height);\r
      left = triggerRect.right + sideOffset;\r
      break;\r
    case "bottom":\r
      top = triggerRect.bottom + sideOffset;\r
      left = calcAlign(triggerRect.left + alignOffset, triggerRect.width, contentRect.width);\r
      break;\r
    case "left":\r
      top = calcAlign(triggerRect.top, triggerRect.height, contentRect.height);\r
      left = triggerRect.left + alignOffset - contentRect.width - sideOffset;\r
      break;\r
  }\r
\r
  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {\r
    const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;\r
    if (left < BUFFER_OFFSET) {\r
      if (side === "left") {\r
        left = triggerRect.right + sideOffset; // ltr\r
      } else {\r
        left = BUFFER_OFFSET;\r
      }\r
    } else if (left + contentRect.width > viewportWidth - BUFFER_OFFSET) {\r
      if (side === "right") {\r
        left = triggerRect.left - contentRect.width - sideOffset; // rtl\r
      } else {\r
        left = viewportWidth - contentRect.width - BUFFER_OFFSET;\r
      }\r
    }\r
  }\r
\r
  return [top, left] as const;\r
}\r
\r
export interface UseVarsPositions extends GetInsetProps {\r
  contentSize: SizeElement | undefined;\r
}\r
export function getVarsPositions(required: UseVarsPositions) {\r
  const { triggerRect, contentRect, contentSize, ...others } = required;\r
  const [top, left] = getInset({ triggerRect, contentRect, ...others });\r
\r
  const vars = {\r
    triggerInset: {\r
      "--top": \`\${top + triggerRect.scrollY}px\`,\r
      "--left": \`\${left + triggerRect.scrollX}px\`\r
    },\r
    triggerSize: {\r
      "--measure-trigger-h": \`\${triggerRect.height}px\`,\r
      "--measure-trigger-w": \`\${triggerRect.width}px\`\r
    },\r
    contentSize: {\r
      "--measure-available-h": \`\${contentSize?.h}px\`,\r
      "--measure-available-w": \`\${contentSize?.w}px\`\r
    }\r
  };\r
  return { vars, top, left };\r
}\r
\r
export interface UseUpdatedPositions {\r
  triggerRect: RectElement;\r
  contentRect: RectElement;\r
  align: \`\${DataAlign}\`;\r
  side: \`\${DataSide}\`;\r
  sideOffset: number;\r
  alignOffset: number;\r
}\r
export function useUpdatedPositions(required: UseUpdatedPositions) {\r
  const { triggerRect, contentRect, align, side, sideOffset, alignOffset } = required;\r
\r
  const [newSide, setNewSide] = useState(side);\r
  const [newAlign, setNewAlign] = useState(align);\r
\r
  const updatedPosition = useCallback(() => {\r
    const dataAlign: \`\${DataAlign}\`[] = ["start", "center", "end"];\r
    const [top, left] = getInset({ align, side, sideOffset, alignOffset, triggerRect, contentRect });\r
\r
    if (triggerRect && contentRect) {\r
      const rect = { top, left, bottom: top + contentRect.height, right: left + contentRect.width, width: contentRect.width, height: contentRect.height };\r
      const isOutOfLeftViewport = rect.left < BUFFER_OFFSET;\r
      const isOutOfRightViewport = rect.right > window.innerWidth - BUFFER_OFFSET;\r
      const isOutOfTopViewport = rect.top < BUFFER_OFFSET;\r
      const isOutOfBottomViewport = rect.bottom > window.innerHeight - BUFFER_OFFSET;\r
\r
      if (isOutOfLeftViewport) {\r
        if (side === DataSide.left) setNewSide(DataSide.right);\r
      } else if (isOutOfRightViewport) {\r
        if (side === DataSide.right) setNewSide(DataSide.left);\r
      } else if (isOutOfTopViewport) {\r
        if (side === DataSide.top) setNewSide(DataSide.bottom);\r
        if (newSide === DataSide.left || newSide === DataSide.right) setNewAlign(nextValue(newAlign, dataAlign?.toReversed()));\r
      } else if (isOutOfBottomViewport) {\r
        if (side === DataSide.bottom) setNewSide(DataSide.top);\r
        if (newSide === DataSide.left || newSide === DataSide.right) setNewAlign(nextValue(newAlign, dataAlign));\r
      } else {\r
        setNewSide(side);\r
        setNewAlign(align);\r
      }\r
    }\r
  }, [align, side, sideOffset, alignOffset, triggerRect, contentRect]);\r
\r
  useLayoutEffect(() => {\r
    updatedPosition();\r
    window.addEventListener("scroll", updatedPosition);\r
    window.addEventListener("resize", updatedPosition);\r
    return () => {\r
      window.removeEventListener("scroll", updatedPosition);\r
      window.removeEventListener("resize", updatedPosition);\r
    };\r
  }, [updatedPosition]);\r
\r
  return { newAlign, newSide, updatedPosition };\r
}\r
\r
interface GetAttributesProps extends ObserveOptions {\r
  dataAlign?: \`\${DataAlign}\`;\r
  dataSide?: \`\${DataSide}\`;\r
}\r
\r
function getAttributes(attr: GetAttributesProps) {\r
  const { dataAlign, observe, dataSide } = attr;\r
  return {\r
    ...setValues(observe?.align && dataAlign, { "data-align": dataAlign }),\r
    ...setValues(observe?.side && dataSide, { "data-side": dataSide })\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
export interface PortalProps {\r
  render: boolean;\r
  portal?: boolean;\r
  children: React.ReactNode;\r
  container?: Element | DocumentFragment | null;\r
  key?: null | string;\r
}\r
export function Portal(_props: PortalProps) {\r
  const { portal = true, render, children, container, key } = _props;\r
  if (typeof document === "undefined" || !render) return null;\r
  return portal ? createPortal(children, container || document.body, key) : children;\r
}\r
\r
export function useOpenState(options: OpenStateOptions = {}) {\r
  const {\r
    hotKeys = "",\r
    side = "bottom",\r
    align = "center",\r
    sideOffset = 0,\r
    alignOffset = 0,\r
    popstate = false,\r
    modal = false,\r
    defaultOpen = false,\r
    multipleOpen = false,\r
    clickOutsideToClose = false,\r
    open: openChange = undefined,\r
    onOpenChange = undefined,\r
    observe,\r
    triggerRef = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null),\r
    contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)\r
  } = options;\r
\r
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(defaultOpen);\r
  const open = openChange !== undefined ? openChange : isOpen;\r
  const setOpen = onOpenChange !== undefined ? onOpenChange : setIsOpen;\r
\r
  const [render, setRender] = useState(open);\r
  const [initialOpen, setInitialOpen] = useState(false);\r
  const [isTouchDevice, setIsTouchDevice] = useState(false);\r
\r
  useHotkeys([[hotKeys, () => setOpen(!open)]]);\r
  useMeasureScrollbar(!open ? render : open, { modal });\r
\r
  const triggerBounding = useElementRect<HTMLButtonElement>(triggerRef?.current);\r
  const contentBounding = useElementRect<HTMLDivElement>(contentRef?.current, render);\r
\r
  const { newAlign, newSide } = useUpdatedPositions({\r
    triggerRect: triggerBounding.rect,\r
    contentRect: contentBounding.rect,\r
    align,\r
    side,\r
    sideOffset,\r
    alignOffset\r
  });\r
\r
  const toggle = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (!open) {\r
      if (popstate) {\r
        window.history.pushState({ open: true }, "");\r
      }\r
      setOpen(true);\r
    } else {\r
      if (popstate) {\r
        window.history.back();\r
      }\r
      setOpen(false);\r
    }\r
  }, [popstate, open, setOpen, multipleOpen, triggerRef]);\r
\r
  const handleOnMouseEnter = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (!isTouchDevice) setOpen(true);\r
  }, [isTouchDevice, setOpen]);\r
\r
  const handleOnMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (!isTouchDevice) setOpen(false);\r
  }, [isTouchDevice, setOpen]);\r
\r
  const handleOnMouseMove = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (isTouchDevice) setIsTouchDevice(false);\r
  }, [isTouchDevice, setIsTouchDevice]);\r
\r
  const handleOnTouchStart = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (!isTouchDevice) setIsTouchDevice(true);\r
    setOpen(true);\r
  }, [isTouchDevice, setIsTouchDevice, setOpen]);\r
\r
  const handleOnTouchEnd = useCallback(() => {\r
    setOpen(false);\r
  }, [setOpen]);\r
\r
  const handleOnKeyDown = useCallback(\r
    (e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLElement>) => {\r
      e.key === "Enter" && toggle();\r
    },\r
    [toggle]\r
  );\r
\r
  useLayoutEffect(() => {\r
    if (open !== defaultOpen) setInitialOpen(true);\r
  }, [open, defaultOpen]);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const historyPopState = () => {\r
      if (open) setOpen(false);\r
    };\r
    if (popstate) {\r
      window.addEventListener("popstate", historyPopState, { passive: true });\r
      return () => {\r
        window.removeEventListener("popstate", historyPopState);\r
      };\r
    }\r
  }, [popstate, open, setOpen]);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const attachListeners = (el: HTMLButtonElement | null) => {\r
      if (el) {\r
        if (observe?.touch) {\r
          el.addEventListener("touchstart", handleOnTouchStart);\r
          el.addEventListener("touchend", handleOnTouchEnd);\r
        }\r
      }\r
    };\r
    const detachListeners = (el: HTMLButtonElement | null) => {\r
      if (el) {\r
        if (observe?.touch) {\r
          el.removeEventListener("touchstart", handleOnTouchStart);\r
          el.removeEventListener("touchend", handleOnTouchEnd);\r
        }\r
      }\r
    };\r
\r
    attachListeners(triggerRef.current);\r
    return () => {\r
      detachListeners(triggerRef.current);\r
    };\r
  }, [toggle, triggerRef, handleOnTouchStart, handleOnTouchEnd, observe?.touch]);\r
  const everyRefs = [triggerRef, contentRef];\r
  const handler = () => clickOutsideToClose && setOpen(false);\r
  const events = DEFAULTEVENTS;\r
\r
  useClickOutside(handler, everyRefs, events);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    let timeoutId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r
    if (open) setRender(true);\r
    else timeoutId = setTimeout(() => setRender(false), 150);\r
    return () => {\r
      if (timeoutId) clearTimeout(timeoutId);\r
    };\r
  }, [open]);\r
\r
  const dataState = open ? (initialOpen ? "open" : "opened") : "closed";\r
  const dataSide = observe?.sideswipe ? newSide : side;\r
  const dataAlign = observe?.alignswipe ? newAlign : align;\r
\r
  const { vars } = getVarsPositions({\r
    sideOffset,\r
    alignOffset,\r
    align: dataAlign,\r
    side: dataSide,\r
    triggerRect: triggerBounding.rect,\r
    contentRect: contentBounding.rect,\r
    contentSize: contentBounding.size\r
  });\r
\r
  function attr(openState = dataState) {\r
    return {\r
      "data-state": openState,\r
      ...getAttributes({ dataAlign, dataSide, observe })\r
    };\r
  }\r
\r
  function styleVars(selector: \`\${Selector}\`) {\r
    return setValues(selector === "content", {\r
      ...setValues(observe?.sideswipe, {\r
        "--side-offset": \`\${sideOffset}px\`,\r
        "--align-offset": \`\${alignOffset}px\`,\r
        ...vars.triggerInset\r
      }),\r
      ...setValues(observe?.measureSize, {\r
        ...vars.triggerSize,\r
        ...vars.contentSize\r
      }),\r
      ...setValues(observe?.contentRect, setVars("content", contentBounding.rect))\r
    });\r
  }\r
\r
  return {\r
    triggerRef,\r
    contentRef,\r
    triggerBounding,\r
    contentBounding,\r
    render,\r
    open,\r
    setOpen,\r
    Portal,\r
    toggle,\r
    attr,\r
    styleVars,\r
